Very low agreeableness, strong anti-elitism, a dangerous worldview, and high populist manichean beliefs produce strong distrust in electoral integrity.

Extremely low trust in government (17.18), parliament (11.05), and judiciary (15.31) combined with very high dangerous worldview (95.39), high populist anti-elitism (62.64), and a history of justice system contact (Charged) produce strong distrust of electoral integrity.
